iran_nuke.notes: Day 14 — RISING. NEW: IAEA discovered Iran hid highly enriched uranium in undamaged underground facility. Fordow bombed again by US but HEU stockpile location confirmed intact. Iran enriching at 60%, only non-nuclear state with this capability. IAEA access still denied. Mojtaba Khamenei's defiant first statement ('will fight on, open additional fronts') signals no diplomatic off-ramp. Trump: 'hitting Iran very hard next week.' No 90% enrichment or nuclear test, but hidden HEU + 60% enrichment + wartime conditions = elevated risk. Up from 9→19.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 14 — CRITICAL STABLE. Mixed signals: naval degradation continuing (90+ vessels destroyed) but Iran defiant — new Supreme Leader vows to keep Hormuz closed, threatens to 'open additional fronts.' Trump: 'hitting Iran very hard next week.' 2,200 Marines heading to ME. Bessent: US Navy will escort tankers 'when militarily possible.' Drone strikes hit Oman (Duqm, Salalah) — conflict spreading to Gulf states. Khamenei threatens to 'set region's oil and gas on fire.' Oil $101/barrel (peaked $126). Six KC-135 crew dead confirmed. Stable at 60 despite naval degradation — Iran's asymmetric strategy (mines, Hormuz chokepoint, drone strikes on Gulf states) compensating for fleet losses.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 14 — ESCALATING. Bloomberg: Israel preparing expanded incursion into south Lebanon. 2 IDF soldiers killed, 14 wounded in south Lebanon. 687 killed in Lebanon (98 children), ~2,000 wounded, 800K displaced. Israel struck Hamas leader Hadi Ali Mustafa in Rashidieh refugee camp — first strike there. Hezbollah rocket fire continues at northern Israel. Katz: 'no time limit.' CNN: 'Israel seizes moment to finish Hezbollah.' Rising.

turkey.notes: SIGNIFICANT ESCALATION — NEW SIGNALS. Third Iranian ballistic missile intercepted by NATO over Turkey. NATO confirmed interception of missile 'heading to Turkey.' Turkey asserting right to self-defense. South Korea issued special travel advisory for SE Turkey (Hatay, Gaziantep). Ankara stressing Incirlik air base is Turkish sovereign territory amid missile scare. Three missile interceptions in 9 days (Mar 4, Mar 9, Mar 13). NATO air defenses now actively engaged against Iranian missiles over Turkish territory. Up from 12→23 — crossed into ELEVATED zone.

india.notes: India monitoring Hormuz crisis — 27 Indian-flagged ships stuck in Persian Gulf (1 started moving). No India-Pakistan friction. Stable.

russia.notes: Trump eased Russian oil sanctions (30-day waiver) to ease Hormuz energy crisis — benefits Russia economically. Russia continues arms supply to Iran while calling for ceasefire. Russia helping Iran with drone tactics (FDD). Putin-Trump diplomacy ongoing. Net effect: sanctions relief offsets arms supply signal. Down slightly from 8→7.

china.notes: China sharply reduced military flights around Taiwan — analysts unsure why. Brief pause followed by resumed but reduced operations. Trump-Xi summit planned Mar 31-Apr 2. China notably silent on Iran war. Mediating Pakistan-Afghanistan. Falling trend as de-escalation in Taiwan Strait visible.

north_korea.notes: Kim Jong Un and daughter observed cruise missile tests from Choe Hyon destroyer (Mar 10-12). Continued testing pattern. DPRK condemned US ME attacks. Fact-check: no confirmed Israeli strike on DPRK embassy in Tehran. SCMP: Iran-DPRK cooperation revival 'highly likely.' Stable elevated.

russia_ukraine.notes: ISW: continued Russian offensive. Ukraine struck Russian electronics plant supplying missile components. Russia scorched-earth on Ukraine energy grid near collapse (NYT). Ukraine struck Russian oil depots in occupied Azovske. Russia earned ~€6bn in 2 weeks from energy crisis. Trump eased Russian sanctions (30-day waiver). Stable elevated.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Entering 3rd week. Overnight strikes in Kabul, Kandahar, Paktia, Paktika — 6+ civilians killed. Fuel depots at Kandahar airport struck. Border fighting at Spin Boldak/Mohmand. China's envoy mediating. Pakistan state TV calls strikes 'successful.' Taliban accuses Pakistan of targeting homes. Stable elevated.

top_signals: Third Iranian ballistic missile intercepted by NATO over Turkey — Turkey asserts self-defense right (Al Jazeera/NYT)
IAEA discovered Iran hid highly enriched uranium in undamaged underground facility (Wikipedia/IAEA)
Mojtaba Khamenei vows revenge, will keep Hormuz blocked, threatens 'additional fronts' (NBC/Reuters)
Trump: US will hit Iran 'very hard over the next week' (Reuters)
Israel preparing expanded incursion into south Lebanon — Bloomberg (Bloomberg)
2,200 US Marines headed to Middle East (ABC News)
Drone strikes hit Oman (Duqm, Salalah) — conflict spreading to Gulf states (Wikipedia)
Oil at $101/barrel, peaked at $126 — IEA calls it 'largest supply disruption in history' (Guardian/Al Jazeera)

zone_changes: iran_nuke: deterrent (9) → elevated (19) — hidden HEU discovery + 60% enrichment
turkey: deterrent (12) → elevated (23) — three NATO missile intercepts, Turkey asserts self-defense
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: MIXED PICTURE: Iran's conventional naval capability degrading (90+ vessels destroyed) but asymmetric strategy compensating — Hormuz blockade persists, drone strikes now hitting Oman, new Supreme Leader defiant. Turkey elevated to ELEVATED ZONE — three Iranian missiles intercepted by NATO in 9 days is serious escalation risk. Iran nuclear track rising — hidden HEU discovery is concerning. Trump's 'very hard next week' + 2,200 Marines = major escalation signal. Two key watch items: (1) Turkey-NATO-Iran triangle — each missile over Turkey increases Article 5 pressure, (2) Whether Trump's promised escalation materializes as strikes on Iranian nuclear facilities, which could push Iran toward actual nuclear breakout.

latest_news.headline: Third Iranian ballistic missile intercepted by NATO over Turkey — Turkey asserts self-defense
latest_news.text: NATO confirmed interception of ballistic missile 'heading to Turkey.' Third such interception in 9 days. Turkey asserts right to self-defense. South Korea issues special travel advisory for SE Turkey. Ankara stresses Incirlik is Turkish sovereign territory.

latest_news.headline: IAEA discovered Iran hid highly enriched uranium in undamaged underground facility
latest_news.text: IAEA found Iran hid HEU in underground facility undamaged by previous strikes. Iran is only non-nuclear state enriching to 60%. Fordow facility bombed again by US. IAEA access denied.

latest_news.headline: New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei vows revenge, will keep Hormuz blocked
latest_news.text: Mojtaba Khamenei's first public statement: vows to keep blocking Strait of Hormuz, threatens to 'open additional fronts where the enemy is extremely vulnerable,' attacks countries hosting US forces.

latest_news.headline: Trump: US will hit Iran 'very hard over the next week'
latest_news.text: President Trump said US was going to be hitting Iran 'very hard over the next week,' shortly after issuing 30-day waiver for Russian oil sanctions to ease energy crisis.

latest_news.headline: Israel preparing expanded incursion into south Lebanon — Bloomberg
latest_news.text: Israel preparing to expand incursion into southern Lebanon to fight Hezbollah. 2 IDF soldiers killed, 14 wounded. 687 killed in Lebanon, ~2,000 wounded, 800K displaced.

latest_news.headline: Drone strikes hit Oman (Duqm, Salalah) — conflict spreading to Gulf states
latest_news.text: Several drones struck Duqm and Salalah in Oman, fuel storage tank damaged. Iran's asymmetric strikes now hitting neutral Gulf states beyond primary combatants.

latest_news.headline: 2,200 US Marines headed to Middle East
latest_news.text: Pentagon deploying 2,200 Marines to Middle East as US escalates military presence. Part of broader reinforcement accompanying Trump's 'very hard' rhetoric.

latest_news.headline: China sharply reduces military flights around Taiwan — analysts uncertain why
latest_news.text: PLA warplane flights around Taiwan sharply reduced over recent days. Analysts cite possible economic concerns, Trump-Xi summit preparation (Mar 31-Apr 2), or strategic repositioning amid ME crisis.

outlook: CRITICAL — ESCALATION ACCELERATING: Day 14 end brings concerning convergence. Three developments elevate risk: (1) TURKEY — three Iranian missiles intercepted by NATO in 9 days puts Article 5 proximity at highest level since Ukraine invasion. Each intercept raises pressure on NATO response. (2) IRAN NUCLEAR — hidden HEU discovery is the most significant nuclear proliferation signal since the war began. 60% enrichment in wartime with IAEA denied access. Trump's 'very hard next week' may target nuclear facilities. (3) NEW SUPREME LEADER — Mojtaba Khamenei's defiant first statement eliminates near-term diplomatic off-ramp. He's staking legitimacy on resistance, making de-escalation politically impossible early in his tenure. Key watch for next 12h: whether Trump's promised escalation materializes as strikes on Iranian nuclear sites, whether Turkey invokes Article 4/5 protections, whether Oman strikes trigger Gulf state military response, and whether expanded Israeli incursion into Lebanon opens a full second front.
